query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-p" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it provides a foundational survey of Knowledge Distillation (KD) schemes, including "multi-teacher KD" and "feature-based" strategies, which are the core mechanisms and vocabulary clusters (Category f) underlying the user's specific work on "Multi-Teacher On-P" and "CollectionLoRA." While it does not address the specific LoRA parameterization or the "50 effects" aggregation, it establishes the canonical prior work on the distillation framework
